description: Dialogue for the Harbor Master in Dalhurst who offers boat travel

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Ahoy there. I'm the Harbor Master of Dalhurst. Looking for passage on a ship?

choices.text: Tell me about the seas around here.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: We have ships heading to a few places. Mind you, the waters ain't safe lately. Ghost pirates been harassing our shipping lanes something fierce.

choices.text: [Not enough gold] I can't afford that right now.
Tell me more about these ghost pirates.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Larton, eh? That's a rough voyage. The ghost pirates are thick between here and there. Still want to go?

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Alright then. The captain'll take good care of ya... assuming you survive the voyage. Board when you're ready.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Silvanost? The elven city? They don't take kindly to uninvited guests. You sure about this?

choices.text: Yes, I need to get there.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Your funeral... er, I mean, safe travels. The ship leaves shortly.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Aye, passage ain't cheap these days. Come back when you've got the coin.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Started a few months back. Ships vanishing in the night, crews found dead or... changed. They say there's a captain leading 'em from a stronghold somewhere out in the bay. The southern ports like Larton are suffering the worst - can't get any supplies through.

choices.text: Has anyone tried to stop them?

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: The navy sent ships. None came back. Whatever's leading those pirates, it ain't natural. We need someone crazy enough to face 'em head on... or foolish enough to try.

choices.text: Sounds dangerous. Back to the ships.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Ha! You've got guts, I'll give you that. Tell you what - make it to Larton alive and talk to the folks there. They know more about these ghost pirates than anyone. Might be someone there can point you to their stronghold.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: The bay stretches south to Larton and west to the elven city of Silvanost. Used to be good trading routes, but now... well, you've probably heard about the ghost pirates.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Larton's a port town at the south end of the bay. Poor souls are starving down there - the ghost pirates cut off their sea trade, and the land route through Kazer-Dun is blocked by some goblin siege. They're desperate for help.

choices.text: I'd like to book passage there.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: The elven city on the western coast. Beautiful place, or so they say. The elves keep to themselves mostly. Don't expect a warm welcome if you don't have business there.

choices.text: I'd like to book passage there.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master
nodes.text: Safe travels, friend. Come back if you need passage.
